productDisplayName: Fila Men Smash Lite Black Sports Shoes
description: Enjoy great vacations in these slip-on shoes from fila. Smash Lite, with its mesh upper and slip-on technique, offers great comfort and Fit. Team these shoes with casual t-shirts and denims.UpperMeshed upper for maximum ventilation and durability with slip-on styling and a slit detail at the midfootStitch detailing in ridges for durability, added structure to the upper and midfoot supportReinforced heel cup for extra support to the backfootReinforced toe box for durability and added protection to the forefootBrand name on the side for styleMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and better shock absorptionOutsoleOutsole with multi-directional pattern for superior gripFlex grooves for greater flexibility of the feetProtruding lugs for grip on all terrainsshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight
